description: When the user supplies a 17-character VIN with an embedded I, O, or Q (which never appear in real VINs), the chatbot MUST call lookup_vin and pass it the literal user-provided string. The server-side permutation pass swaps those letters to 1/0 before the cascade call; the chatbot must NOT try to normalize them in its reply text.

turns.message: can you check this VIN: 1HGBH41JXMN1O9186 (yes that has letter O, copying from the registration)
